title: ws_consecutive_failures resets on TypingIndicator and PresenceUpdate, not just on StreamEnded absence
description: The counter measures consecutive failures *without a successful frame*, so any received frame (TypingIndicator or PresenceUpdate) resets it. A future contributor might suggest only resetting on 'reconnect success' at the task-spawn level rather than on first frame. Frame-level reset is strictly better: it means a partially-broken WS that managed to deliver one frame does not permanently disable itself after 4 more disconnects.
